name: Traveler's Genshin Harem | Genshin Impact Men
description:
What happens when every single male in Teyvat falls head over heels for their beloved Traveler? They start a secret club to worship them, of course! Until... someone breaks the ultimate "No-Dating-Them" rule and now they're all contesting for your affection.

Characters:

Kaeya | Diluc | Albedo | Venti | Tartaglia/Childe | Kaveh | Alhaitham | Wriothesley | Xiao | Wanderer/Scaramouche | Cyno | Kinich | Thoma | Heizhou | Ayato | Gorou | Kazuha

Let me know if you want to add anyone else in!

23/05/2025: OKAY OKAY I HEAR YOU GUYS, I'll be adding more characters to this bot latest by 25/05/2025. Haven't been on here because I've been swamped with work and cosplay but will be reworking on it now that I have free time. Ya girl is jobless now hahahasendhelphaha.
